wizard.title: Add New AI System
wizard.subtitle: Complete this wizard to classify your AI system and identify compliance requirements
wizard.uploadDescription: We'll analyze your docs and pre-fill the classification form
wizard.uploadDropzone: Drop files here or click to upload
wizard.uploadSupported: Supported: PDF, DOCX, MD, TXT (max 10MB each, up to 5 files)
wizard.uploadMaxFilesError: You can upload up to {max} files
wizard.analysisComplete: Analysis complete! Review the extracted information below.
wizard.detectedRiskDescription: We found potential compliance risks in your documents
wizard.reviewAndConfirm: Please review and confirm the information below

step1.title: Basic Information
step1.name: System Name
step1.nameDescription: A clear, descriptive name for your AI system
step1.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain what this AI system does and how it's used...
step1.descriptionDescription: Describe the purpose, functionality, and key features
step1.aiTypeDescription: What type of AI technology does this system use?

step2.title: Use Case
step2.description: How is this AI system used?
step2.domainDescription: What area does this AI system operate in?

step3.title: Data & Impact
step3.description: What data does it process and what impact does it have?
step3.decisionsDescription: Does this system make or significantly influence decisions about people?
step3.personalDataDescription: Does it process personal or sensitive information?
step3.profilesDescription: Does it create profiles, scores, or predictions about individuals?
step3.endUsersDescription: Who are the end users affected by this system?

step4.title: Markets
step4.marketsDescription: Select all markets where this AI system is used or deployed

validation.nameMax: System name must be less than 200 characters
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 10 characters
validation.endUsersRequired: Please select at least one end user type
validation.marketsRequired: Please select at least one market

gaps.subtitle: for
gaps.noGapsDescription: This system meets all compliance requirements for the selected filters

documents.title: Documents
documents.noDocumentsDescription: Generate compliance reports to document your AI system
documents.upgradeMessage: Document generation is available on Starter plan and above
documents.classificationRequiredMessage: System must be classified before generating this document
documents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?

report.title: AI System Risk Classification Report
report.subtitle: EU AI Act Risk Classification
report.disclaimer: This document is generated by Complyance.io and is not a legal opinion. Consult with qualified legal professionals for compliance verification.
report.noException: No Article 6.3 exception applies. This system is subject to full high-risk AI requirements.

roadmap.title: Compliance Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Step-by-Step Plan to EU AI Act Compliance
roadmap.disclaimer: This roadmap is a planning tool and not legal advice. Timelines should be adjusted based on your organization's capacity and regulatory deadlines.

annexIV.title: Annex IV Technical Documentation
annexIV.subtitle: EU AI Act Article 11 Requirements
annexIV.section1Content: This section provides a detailed description of the AI system, its intended purpose, and the persons or groups of persons on which the system is intended to be used.
annexIV.section2Content: Description of the AI model architecture, algorithms, data requirements, and technical specifications.
annexIV.section3Content: Documentation of the risk management system as required by Article 9 of the EU AI Act.
annexIV.section4Content: Description of human oversight measures implemented to ensure safe operation (Article 14).
annexIV.section5Content: Documentation of measures to ensure appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity (Article 15).
annexIV.section6Content: Description of the post-market monitoring system as required by Article 72.
annexIV.disclaimer: This is a template document. All placeholder sections must be completed with specific information about your AI system. This is not legal advice.
